title: Inconsistent Result for Complex Query with UNION and EXCEPT
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### When I run the same SQL script using MariaDB, MySQL, and OceanBase, it returns all 3 3 rows

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS database56;
CREATE DATABASE database56;
USE database56;
CREATE TABLE t31(c0 DECIMAL NOT NULL DEFAULT -346132398 , PRIMARY KEY(c0));
CREATE TABLE t0 LIKE t31;
ALTER TABLE t0  CHANGE c0 c0 DECIMAL NOT NULL ;

ALTER TABLE t0  CHANGE c0 c0 DECIMAL NOT NULL ;
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT DISTINCT (CASE t0.c0 WHEN t0.c0 THEN t0.c0 ELSE (CASE t0.c0 WHEN t0.c0 THEN (- (t0.c0)) WHEN (('')^(0.5116675186518005)) THEN ((t0.c0)OR(false)) ELSE ((t0.c0) IS NULL) END ) END ) FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0;
DELETE FROM t31 WHERE t31.c0 ORDER BY ((IS_IPV4(NULL))AND('6Co.)^h'));

INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (1964816723);
INSERT IGNORE  INTO t0(c0) VALUES (-2021458823), (1124550393);


(SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))) INTERSECT (SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))));-- cardinality: 3\n\n

(SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))) UNION SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))) EXCEPT ((SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))) EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))) UNION (SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))) EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))));-- cardinality: 6\n;

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
mysql> (SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))) INTERSECT (SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))));-- cardinality: 3\n\n

+-------------+-------------+
| -2021458823 | -2021458823 |
|  1124550393 |  1124550393 |
|  1964816723 |  1964816723 |
+-------------+-------------+
3 rows in set, 2 warnings (0.02 sec)

mysql> 
mysql> (SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))) UNION SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))) EXCEPT ((SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))) EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))) UNION (SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0)))))) EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT v0.c0, t0.c0 FROM  v0 NATURAL LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE ((CAST(0.4451817671843947 AS CHAR))>(((FIELD(v0.c0, ((t0.c0)NOT LIKE(t0.c0))))&(((v0.c0)>>(v0.c0))))))));-- cardinality: 6\n;

+-------------+-------------+
| -2021458823 | -2021458823 |
|  1124550393 |  1124550393 |
|  1964816723 |  1964816723 |
+-------------+-------------+
3 rows in set, 2 warnings (0.02 sec)
